---
applyTo: "**/src/*.ts,*.js" 
---

### User Story ###

As an Admin
I want to delete a role
So that I can keep the software information up to date.
Flow will be when logged in as an admin, the admin will click into the job role into the job role detail page and see a delete button. When clicked the admin will be prompted with a warning asking for confirmation before deletion. If the admin confirms, the role will be deleted and the admin will be redirected to the job roles list page with a deleted successfully message prompt. A user will not be able to see or use the delete button

Acceptance criteria:

Able to delete the role from the job roles list page and the job specification page
Warning must appear asking for confirmation before deletion

We are only working on the frontend for this implementation, the backend has already been implemented in a past user story.
